title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
description: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

title: Why Garry Tan’s Claude Code setup has gotten so much love, and hate
description: Thousands of people are trying Garry Tan's Claude Code setup, which was shared on GitHub. And everyone has an opinion: even Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

title: The Pentagon is developing alternatives to Anthropic, report says
description: After their dramatic falling-out, it doesn't seem as though Anthropic and the Pentagon are getting back together.

title: BuzzFeed debuts AI slop apps in bid for new revenue
description: BuzzFeed unveiled new AI-powered social apps at SXSW, but its demos drew muted reactions.

title: Google’s Personal Intelligence feature is expanding to all US users
description: Personal Intelligence allows Google's AI assistant to tap into your Google ecosystem, such as Gmail and Google Photos, to provide more tailored responses.

title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

title: AI’s ‘boys’ club’ could widen the wealth gap for women, says Rana el Kaliouby
description: AI investor Rana el Kaliouby warns that if women are shut out of AI funding and leadership, the consequences will be grim.

title: World launches tool to verify humans behind AI shopping agents
description: As AI agents take the reins for online shoppers, Sam Altman's unconventional startup is looking to expand its verification offerings to support agentic commerce.

title: Niv-AI exits stealth to wring more power performance out of GPUs
description: The company raised $12 million in seed funding to measure and manage GPU power surges.

title: Gamma adds AI image-generation tools in bid to take on Canva and Adobe
description: The company's new product, called Gamma Imagine, will let users employ text prompts to create brand-specific assets like interactive charts and visualizations, marketing collateral, social graphics, and infographics.

title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
description: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
description: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
description: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.
